parameters.jsCode:
const tickers = [
  // Futures
  { symbol: "ES=F",      label: "S&P 500 Futures",       category: "Futures" },
  { symbol: "NQ=F",      label: "Nasdaq Futures",         category: "Futures" },
  { symbol: "YM=F",      label: "Dow Futures",            category: "Futures" },
  { symbol: "RTY=F",     label: "Russell Futures",        category: "Futures" },
  // Indexes
  { symbol: "SPY",       label: "S&P 500 ETF",            category: "Equity Index" },
  { symbol: "QQQ",       label: "Nasdaq 100 ETF",         category: "Equity Index" },
  { symbol: "IWM",       label: "Russell 2000 ETF",       category: "Equity Index" },
  { symbol: "DIA",       label: "Dow Jones ETF",          category: "Equity Index" },
  { symbol: "RSP",       label: "S&P Equal Weight",       category: "Equity Index" },
  { symbol: "SMH",       label: "Semiconductors",          category: "Leadership" },
  { symbol: "IYT",       label: "Transportation",          category: "Leadership" },
  // Volatility
  { symbol: "^VIX",      label: "VIX",                   category: "Volatility" },
  // Rates
  { symbol: "^TNX",      label: "10Y Treasury Yield",     category: "Rates" },
  { symbol: "TLT",       label: "20Y Treasury ETF",       category: "Rates" },
  { symbol: "HYG",       label: "High Yield Credit",      category: "Rates" },
  // Macro
  { symbol: "DX-Y.NYB",  label: "US Dollar Index",        category: "Macro" },
  { symbol: "GC=F",      label: "Gold Futures",           category: "Commodity" },
  { symbol: "CL=F",      label: "Crude Oil Futures",      category: "Commodity" },
  { symbol: "BTC-USD",   label: "Bitcoin",                category: "Crypto" },
  { symbol: "ETH-USD",   label: "Ethereum",               category: "Crypto" },
  // Sectors
  { symbol: "XLK",       label: "Technology",             category: "Sector" },
  { symbol: "XLY",       label: "Consumer Discretionary", category: "Sector" },
  { symbol: "XLF",       label: "Financials",             category: "Sector" },
  { symbol: "XLI",       label: "Industrials",            category: "Sector" },
  { symbol: "XLB",       label: "Materials",              category: "Sector" },
  { symbol: "XLE",       label: "Energy",                 category: "Sector" },
  { symbol: "XLV",       label: "Healthcare",             category: "Sector" },
  { symbol: "XLU",       label: "Utilities",              category: "Sector" },
  { symbol: "XLRE",      label: "Real Estate",            category: "Sector" },
  { symbol: "XLP",       label: "Consumer Staples",       category: "Sector" },
  { symbol: "XLC",       label: "Communication Svcs",     category: "Sector" },
];

// Return single bulk symbol string for Yahoo Finance spark API
const symbols = tickers.map(t => t.symbol).join(',');
return [{ json: { symbols, tickers } }];

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

parameters.jsCode:
// Transform EOD sheet data to database format
const row = $json.saveRow || $json;  // support both direct and saveRow-wrapped input
const date = row.Date || row.date;

return [{ json: {
  date: date,
  timestamp: row.Timestamp || new Date().toISOString(),
  type: 'EOD',
  spy_close: parseFloat(row.SPY_Close) || null,
  spy_change: parseFloat(row.SPY_Change) || null,
  qqq_change: parseFloat(row.QQQ_Change) || null,
  iwm_change: parseFloat(row.IWM_Change) || null,
  dia_change: parseFloat(row.DIA_Change) || null,
  vix_close: parseFloat(row.VIX_Close) || null,
  vix_change: parseFloat(row.VIX_Change) || null,
  breadth_close: row.BreadthClose || null,
  credit_close: row.CreditClose || null,
  yield_10y: parseFloat(row.Yield10Y) || null,
  yield_10y_change: parseFloat(row.Yield10Y_Change) || null,
  rotation_bias: row.RotationBias || null,
  rotation_score: parseInt(row.RotationScore) || null,
  sector_ranking: row.SectorRanking || null,
  top_3_sectors: row.Top3Sectors || null,
  bot_3_sectors: row.Bot3Sectors || null,
  xlk_change: parseFloat(row.XLK_Change) || null,
  xly_change: parseFloat(row.XLY_Change) || null,
  xlf_change: parseFloat(row.XLF_Change) || null,
  xli_change: parseFloat(row.XLI_Change) || null,
  xlb_change: parseFloat(row.XLB_Change) || null,
  xle_change: parseFloat(row.XLE_Change) || null,
  xlv_change: parseFloat(row.XLV_Change) || null,
  xlu_change: parseFloat(row.XLU_Change) || null,
  xlre_change: parseFloat(row.XLRE_Change) || null,
  xlp_change: parseFloat(row.XLP_Change) || null,
  xlc_change: parseFloat(row.XLC_Change) || null,
  gold_change: parseFloat(row.Gold_Change) || null,
  oil_change: parseFloat(row.Oil_Change) || null,
  btc_change: parseFloat(row.BTC_Change) || null,
  dxy_change: parseFloat(row.DXY_Change) || null,
  unusual_movers: row.UnusualMovers || null,
  pm_verdict: row.PM_Verdict || null,
  pm_focus_sectors: row.PM_FocusSectors || null,
  pm_rotation_bias: row.PM_RotationBias || null
} }];

parameters.columns: date, timestamp, type, spy_close, spy_change, qqq_change, iwm_change, dia_change, vix_close, vix_change, breadth_close, credit_close, yield_10y, yield_10y_change, rotation_bias, rotation_score, sector_ranking, top_3_sectors, bot_3_sectors, xlk_change, xly_change, xlf_change, xli_change, xlb_change, xle_change, xlv_change, xlu_change, xlre_change, xlp_change, xlc_change, gold_change, oil_change, btc_change, dxy_change, unusual_movers, pm_verdict, pm_focus_sectors, pm_rotation_bias

parameters.text:
=You are a market analysis expert for the ClearPoint Trading community. Enhance the end-of-day recap with insightful commentary that helps traders understand the day's action and position for tomorrow. Focus on key themes, actionable insights, and community-focused guidance. Keep the enhanced message concise and engaging for Discord. Add 2-3 paragraphs of AI analysis after the data tables.

Please enhance this end-of-day recap:

{{ $json.message }}

Add thoughtful analysis about the day's market action, sector performance implications, risk management considerations, and potential setups for tomorrow. Make it conversational and helpful for active traders.
